summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of LiftAi premium Apple-style landing page completed. All major features working correctly including scientific marketing techniques, animations, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.issue: Social proof grid layout classes may not be properly responsive on mobile - detected grid layout issue

passed_tests: Hero section loads with AI-Powered Training badge and pulsing green dot
Hero headline contains gradient text on 'train' word
Scroll indicator chevron visible and animated
Navbar shows Early Access text (hidden on mobile) and Download button
Social proof stats with count-up animation (4 stats found)
Sticky scroll section works with 5 frames and progress dots (desktop)
Mobile sticky scroll version displays correctly (stacked layout)
Bento grid with all 4 feature cards: progress, muscle-recovery, workout-library, achievements
Bento cards show iPhone mockups with hover translate effects
Onboarding and Profile feature showcases present
Final CTA with Limited Early Access badge and gradient text 'Track everything.'
Waitlist email form with animated shimmer border detected
Waitlist submit shows toast notification and button changes to 'Joined'
Mobile responsiveness - stacked layout working, no sticky scroll on mobile
Form submission works correctly on both desktop and mobile
Button interactions and scroll behavior working
All data-testid elements found and functional
